label: Hediff infection pathway
description: One entry in a possiblePathways list. Loaded via LoadDataFromXmlCustom: element name is the InfectionPathwayDef defName (or 'li' with defName as text), optional element text is the localized explanation shown to the player.

pathway.label: Pathway
pathway.description: InfectionPathwayDef that this entry describes. Loaded from the XML element name.

explanation.label: Explanation
explanation.description: Localized text shown to the player explaining how this hediff spreads via the pathway. Optional; omit to show no explanation.
